rulings.Case Title: MARIA DEL RAYO VASQUEZ VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 25, 2019 Line 1. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID POST VS. REDFIN CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 25, 2019 Line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW WARREN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to July 25, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than June 28, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID POST VS. REDFIN CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Cross-Defendants Vanguard Properties, Inc. And Andrew J. Warren To Strike Portions Of Cross-Complaint Of Chris Amarante
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 25, 2019 Line CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW WARREN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Cross-Defendants Vanguard Properties, Inc. And Andrew J. Warren To Strike Portions Of Cross-Complaint Of Chris Amarante is continued to July 25, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than June 28, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHUN KUM EXTER VS. SAM HOM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion; Motion For Stay Of Execution Of Judgment Pending Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 25, 2019 Line APPELLANT SAM HOM, YOKO YAMAGUCHI Notice Of Motion; Motion For Stay Of Execution Of Judgment Pending Appeal is GRANTED. Defendants to post $14,654.83 with the Court no later than 2:00 p.m. on June 25, 2019. Defendant to post $1,500 monthly on or before the 1st of each month during the pendency of appeal starting on July 1, 2019. If the first of the month falls on a weekend or Court holiday, the posting shall be made no later than 2:00 p.m. the next business day. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ERNEST MIDDLEBROOK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 25, 2019 Line DEFENDANT ERNEST MIDDLEBROOK DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)
